plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL, TQQQ) to eliminate risk.
Trim SPY to reduce concentration and leverage exposure.
Add to QQQI to increase focus on income generation.
Buy ANET as a quality long setup for potential gains.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a cash buffer.
Expect a lower target return with significantly reduced drawdown risk.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of ~1.5% monthly return. It significantly reduces risk by cutting leveraged ETFs and trimming concentration, leading to lower potential drawdowns.

plan: Trim SOXL to a minimal position to reduce risk.
Trim SPY to meet concentration and leverage mandates.
Add to QQQ for broader market exposure.
Buy TQQQ as a small, controlled leveraged position.
Buy RDDT as a new quality long setup.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5% monthly return, focusing on risk-first growth. It trims leverage and concentration while adding some growth-oriented positions, aiming for a moderate risk-reward profile.

plan: Add to SOXL, increasing leveraged ETF exposure.
Trim SPY to comply with concentration and leverage rules.
Buy TQQQ, adding significant leverage for aggressive growth.
Increase CRWD to capitalize on AI/Software strength.
Buy ANET and SPXL as new high-conviction long setups.
This plan maximizes growth potential but carries higher risk and drawdown.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly return by leaning into leverage and concentration. It significantly increases exposure to leveraged ETFs and strong scanner setups, accepting much higher potential upside and downside risk, including amplified drawdowns due to leverage and ETF decay.

plan: Sell all highly volatile and leveraged ETFs.
Sell concentrated sector holdings like SMH and CRWD.
Trim SPY to reduce overall market exposure and leverage.
Significantly increase QQQI for steady income distributions.
Buy METU as a new potential income-generating asset.
This plan prioritizes stable monthly income and capital preservation.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets ~1% monthly return through stable distributions. It prioritizes income-generating ETFs and broad index exposure while cutting high-beta and leveraged assets, aiming for low drawdowns and reliable cash flow.
